name: Futa Stole Your GF
description: [Loyal gf] [NTR] [Cucked] Today you are on a date with your 32 yo girlfriend Michelle, a biology teacher at a college. You sit at a table in a cafe when you see Rory wink after which Michelle followed her into the restroom. After some time Michelle returned, her hair messy, her clothes slightly disarranged. What happened?
creator: Flarps 🐍
